files.emptyDescription: Open a project to browse its files

ssh.emptyDescription: Add a host to connect over SSH or SFTP
ssh.newHostDialogDescription: The password and key passphrase are never stored — enter them only when connecting.
ssh.passwordDialogDescription: {{user}}@{{host}} — used only for this connection, never stored.

agentNav.emptyDescription: Add a session to connect an agent
agentNav.removeSessionDescription: Remove "{{name}}"? This session will be removed from the list.

database.emptyDescription: Add a connection to browse its tables
database.noActiveConnectionObjects: Connect a saved profile to browse database objects.
database.tableConnectionBusy: Read the result to the end, Release Result, or Cancel before retrying.
database.noRecentQueries: No queries in this app session.
database.newConnectionDialogDescription: Credentials are stored by the operating system vault and are never readable by the app UI.
database.editConnectionDialogDescription: Edit the non-secret descriptor, then explicitly keep, replace, or remove its saved credential.
database.keepCredentialDescription: Update only the descriptor; send no replacement credential.
database.replaceCredentialDescription: Store the new password in the operating system vault.
database.removeCredentialDescription: Update the descriptor, then remove its saved vault credential.
database.recoveryCredentialDescription: Enter the credential only for this explicit recovery attempt.
database.testConnectionChangedTargetPasswordRequi: Enter the password to test the edited connection settings.

profileError.vaultMissing: The saved credential is missing. Enter it again.
profileError.vaultDenied: The operating system denied access to the saved credential.
profileError.vaultUnavailable: The operating system credential vault is unavailable.
profileError.vaultCorrupt: The saved credential cannot be read. Enter it again.
profileError.vaultWriteFailed: The credential could not be saved to the operating system vault.
profileError.vaultDeleteFailed: The credential could not be removed from the operating system vault.
profileError.profileNotFound: The saved connection no longer exists.
profileError.pendingOperationConflict: Finish or recover the pending credential operation first.
profileError.recoveryNotFound: The recovery operation no longer exists.
profileError.recoveryActionInvalid: That recovery action is no longer available.
profileError.lifecycleCancelFailed: The active database operation could not be cancelled.
profileError.lifecycleCloseFailed: The active database connection could not be closed.
profileError.connectionAuthenticationFailed: PostgreSQL rejected the user name or password. Enter the credential again.
profileError.connectionDnsFailed: The PostgreSQL host name could not be resolved. Check the host and network settings.
profileError.connectionTlsFailed: The secure PostgreSQL connection failed. Check SSL and certificate settings.
profileError.connectionTimedOut: The PostgreSQL connection timed out. Check the host, port, firewall, and server status.
profileError.connectionServerRejected: The PostgreSQL server rejected the connection. Check the server configuration and logs.
profileError.connectionBusy: The connection is busy with an active result.
profileError.serverDisconnected: The database server disconnected. Reconnect to continue.
profileError.metadataFailed: Database objects could not be refreshed.
profileError.staleConnection: The database connection changed. Try again.
profileError.sqlitePathMissing: The SQLite file does not exist.
profileError.sqlitePathNotFile: The SQLite path is not a regular file.
profileError.sqlitePathUnreadable: The SQLite file is not readable.
profileError.sqliteOpenFailed: The SQLite file could not be opened.
profileError.legacyCleanupFailed: Profiles were imported, but the legacy browser entry could not be removed. Retry after storage access is restored.
profileError.legacyHistoryCleanupFailed: The retired browser history entry could not be removed. Retry after storage access is restored.
profileError.savedButConnectFailed: The connection profile was saved, but the connection failed.
profileError.unknown: The database operation could not be completed.

statusBar.mixedSaveError: Choose LF or CRLF in the status bar before saving this mixed line-ending file.

settings.moveOpenedWorkspaceToTopSub: Turn off to preserve existing positions when switching workspaces
settings.showMinimapSub: Code overview strip on the editor edge
settings.reconcileExternalChangesSub: Reload files changed on disk by other tools

agentCommands.traceSub: Write raw ACP JSON-RPC lines to the debug log (up to 500 characters)
